commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5dbea4e54090a15aed7cbe7b6921e6dddba12159)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds default-level iMessage monitor diagnostics for selected echo/reflection drops and structured `watch.subscribe` startup retry/failure logs, with focused tests for the new formatting.

PR surface: Source +91, Tests +48. Total +139 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding at source level: current `resolveIMessageInboundDecision` can return `reason: "from me"` before the new diagnostic reasons are checked. I did not run a live iMessage reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow repair can update the PR branch to cover the omitted `from me` diagnostic path and add focused tests without changing iMessage delivery behavior.

target.title: fix(imessage): surface inbound startup diagnostics
target.body:
## Summary

- Add default-level, privacy-safe diagnostics when inbound rows are dropped for echo/reflection reasons (`echo`, `self-chat echo`, `agent echo in self-chat`, `reflected assistant content`). The log includes account, reason, numeric chat id when present, row/message id, GUID presence, group flag, and timestamp, but not message text, sender handles, or full GUIDs.
- Add structured `watch.subscribe` startup retry/failure context: account, `cliPath`, db path presence, remote-host presence, timeout, `since_rowid`, attachment/reaction flags, attempt count, and retry delay.
- Keep this diagnostics-only: no inbound delivery policy, watch retry classification, retry count, teardown, or thrown error behavior changes.

Refs #89593.
Refs #87263.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/imessage/src/monitor.watch-subscribe-retry.test.ts` (4 tests)
- `pnpm format:check -- extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.watch-subscribe-retry.test.ts`
- `pnpm lint:extensions -- extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.watch-subscribe-retry.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review this diagnostics-only iMessage monitor patch. It should not change inbound delivery policy or watch.subscribe retry behavior. Focus on log noise/privacy, whether echo/reflection drops are surfaced without message content/sender handles, whether watch.subscribe retry/failure diagnostics include useful startup context, and whether tests cover the new formatting."` (clean)

## Current proof gap

This PR intentionally does not claim a behavior fix for either issue. It adds the missing evidence needed to distinguish these cases in the next live repro:

- #89593: whether the inbound row is being classified as echo/self-chat/reflection versus failing before the normal decision path.
- #87263: whether `watch.subscribe` is timing out with a specific startup configuration (`cliPath`, db path, `since_rowid`, timeout, remote/local bridge shape).

A broader local run of `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/imessage/src/monitor.watch-subscribe-retry.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/inbound-processing.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/self-chat-dedupe.test.ts` currently fails in the untouched `inbound-processing.test.ts` expectation for the echo-cache options object. The touched retry diagnostics test passes.
target.author: omarshahine
